title: The Friends Mod
description:
Introducing the "Friends" mod, adding a multitude of unique pals to your world!

Adds: Mimic Plant, Mimics
-Mimics can copy your skin, name, and voice...
body:
The Friends mod adds odd mimics that birth from flowers, these mimics don the skin of the player that touches any mimic plants.

Adds: Mimic Plant, Mimics
-Mimics can copy your skin, name, and voice...

Requires Simple Voice Chat

Credit to PROhitman for creating this :)
